form.label: SafeLine — IP Reputation & Hunt
form.description: Source IP profiling, repeat offenders, persistence, and threat hunting.

search.query: `safeline_waf` src_country=* | stats count by src_country | sort - count
`safeline_waf` $ip_tok$ $ctry_tok$ is_attack=1 | stats count AS attacks by src_ip | where attacks>=10 | stats count
`safeline_waf` $ip_tok$ $ctry_tok$ is_attack=1 | stats earliest(_time) AS first_seen by src_ip | where first_seen >= relative_time(now(),"$tr.earliest$") | stats count
`safeline_waf` $ip_tok$ $ctry_tok$ is_attack=1 | stats dc(site_url) AS sites by src_ip | where sites>=2 | stats count

table.title: IP risk scoreboard — sorted by computed risk score

search.query: `safeline_waf` $ip_tok$ $ctry_tok$ src_ip=* | stats count AS requests count(eval(is_attack=1)) AS attacks count(eval(blocked=1)) AS blocked count(eval(severity=="critical")) AS critical count(eval(severity=="high")) AS high dc(attack_type) AS distinct_attack_types dc(site_url) AS sites_targeted dc(urlpath) AS distinct_paths values(attack_type) AS attack_types values(site_name) AS sites earliest(_time) AS first_seen latest(_time) AS last_seen by src_ip src_country src_city | eval risk_score = (critical*50) + (high*15) + (attacks*2) + (sites_targeted*5) + (distinct_attack_types*3) | eval persistence_min = round((last_seen - first_seen)/60, 0) | eval first_seen = strftime(first_seen,"%F %T") | eval last_seen = strftime(last_seen,"%F %T") | where attacks > 0 OR risk_score > 0 | sort - risk_score | head 50 | fields src_ip src_country src_city risk_score requests attacks critical high blocked distinct_attack_types attack_types sites_targeted sites distinct_paths persistence_min first_seen last_seen

`safeline_waf` $ip_tok$ $ctry_tok$ is_attack=1 | stats count AS attacks by src_ip | eval bucket = case( attacks=1, "1 attack", attacks<=5, "2-5", attacks<=10, "6-10", attacks<=50, "11-50", attacks<=100, "51-100", attacks>100, "100+") | stats count AS ips by bucket | sort bucket
`safeline_waf` $ctry_tok$ src_country=* is_attack=1 | stats count AS attacks dc(src_ip) AS unique_ips by src_country | sort - attacks | head 15

table.title: New attackers (first seen in this period)

search.query: `safeline_waf` $ctry_tok$ is_attack=1 | eventstats earliest(_time) AS first_ever by src_ip | where first_ever >= relative_time(now(), "$tr.earliest$") | stats count AS attacks dc(attack_type) AS types values(attack_type) AS attack_types dc(site_url) AS sites latest(_time) AS last_seen by src_ip src_country src_city | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%F %T") | sort - attacks | head 25

`safeline_waf` $ctry_tok$ is_attack=1 | stats dc(site_url) AS sites_count count AS attacks values(site_name) AS sites values(attack_type) AS attack_types by src_ip src_country | where sites_count>=2 | sort - sites_count - attacks | head 25

`safeline_waf` $ip_tok$ | stats count AS hits count(eval(is_attack=1)) AS attacks count(eval(blocked=1)) AS blocked values(method) AS methods values(status_code) AS statuses latest(_time) AS last_seen by site_name urlpath | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%F %T") | sort - hits | head 30
`safeline_waf` $ip_tok$ | sort - _time | head 100 | table _time method site_name urlpath status_code attack_type severity action rule_id user_agent ja4_fingerprint
